source_section.title_label_raw: Non-Conforming Structures and Uses Non-Conforming Structures

provisions.text: In any zone, the restrictions in the Charter respecting non- conforming structures that are not primarily used for residential purposes are relaxed by allowing them to be extended, enlarged, or altered if the extension, enlargement, or alteration does not further increase a non-conformity with a requirement of this By-law.

In any zone, on a lot that contains a structure that is primarily used for residential purposes, the restrictions in the Charter respecting non-conforming structures are relaxed by allowing them to be extended, enlarged, altered, or reconstructed if the extension, enlargement, alteration, or reconstruction does not further increase a non-conformity with a requirement of this By- law. Non-Conforming Uses

sections.title_label_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in accordance with Section 257 of the Charter.

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: The change of a non-residential non-conforming use to a less intensive non- conforming use of land or non-conforming use in a structure may be considered by development agreement, in accordance with Section 486.

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: Where a non-conforming use in a structure exists, the volume of the structure containing that non-conforming use may be extended, enlarged, or altered, providing:

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: the structure is located in an ER-3, ER-2, or ER-1 zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: the extension, enlargement, or alteration to the volume of the structure is used as a non-conforming low-density dwelling use; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: all other applicable requirements of this By-law are met.

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: Where a non-conforming use in a structure exists, the structure may be rebuilt, replaced, or repaired if destroyed or damaged by fire or otherwise, up to one hundred percent of the market value of the building including its foundation, providing: (RCCC- Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: the structure is located in an ER-3, ER-2, or ER-1 zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: the non-conforming use is a low-density dwelling use and that use will occupy the rebuilt, replaced, or repaired structure; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: all other applicable requirements of this By-law are met.

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: Where a non-conforming use in a structure exists, the structure may be rebuilt, replaced, or repaired if destroyed or damaged by fire or otherwise, up to one hundred percent of the market value of the building including its foundation, providing:

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: the structure is located in an ER-3, ER-2, or ER-1 zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: the rebuilt, replaced, or repaired structure is substantially the same as it was before the destruction or damage; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: the non-conforming use is a multi-unit dwelling use and that use will occupy the rebuilt, replaced, or repaired structure.

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: In accordance with Section 487, where a non-residential non- conforming use in a structure exists, Council may, by development agreement, allow the volume of the structure containing that non-conforming use to be extended, enlarged, or altered.

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: The non-conforming use in a structure is permitted to expand into an extension, enlargement, or alteration that complies with Subsection 24(6) and Section 487.

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section relaxes certain non-conforming uses in
provisions.text: In accordance with Section 488, where a non-conforming use exists on a lot or a portion of a lot that is needed for the acquisition of land by the Province of Nova Scotia, the Halifax Dartmouth Bridge Commission, or the Municipality for public purposes, Council may, by development agreement, allow the use to be relocated on the same lot or an adjacent lot.
